description_long: This hotel is a single-story, modern structure with a rectangular footprint and a central open courtyard filled with greenery and seating. The building features multiple guest rooms arranged around the courtyard, each with large windows and direct access to the central area. The exterior walls are predominantly white with black accents, and the roofline is flat, giving the hotel a contemporary appearance. The front entrance is set back from the street, with a gated fence and a paved walkway leading to the main doors. Palm trees and landscaped areas are visible both inside the courtyard and along the perimeter, enhancing the resort-like ambiance. A swimming pool is located at one end of the building, adjacent to a row of guest rooms and outdoor lounging spaces.
description: A modern, single-story hotel with a central courtyard, flat roof, and a mix of white and black exterior walls, featuring a pool and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated entrance, paved walkway, and central courtyard with visible palm trees and seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, pool area, and rows of guest rooms with large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open courtyard, pool, and extensive landscaping along the back edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, guest rooms, and a green lawn area adjacent to the building.
